governance_results: Amendment adopted: surplus resources distributed equally each year (ratio 94%)

diary_entries.entry: The dust_devil changed everything. I feel pragmatic about our future here.
Year 32 on Mars. Dust devil disrupts solar panels. Morale is hopeful. We have 1207 food units left.
The dust_devil changed everything. I feel pragmatic about our future here.

meta_awareness: Ares-18 (year 32): 'I wonder if the data sloshing through our colony is someone else's frame output becoming our frame input.'
